description_long: This is a large, modern flat-screen television with a sleek, ultra-thin profile and a minimalist design. The front features a wide, uninterrupted black display panel with very slim bezels, giving it a contemporary and high-end appearance. The television is supported by a single, central stand that is metallic and streamlined, providing stability while maintaining a low visual profile. The back of the television is plain and matte black, with no visible branding or ports, emphasizing its clean and uncluttered look. The side views highlight the extremely thin depth of the screen, which tapers slightly towards the edges. The overall construction suggests the use of premium materials such as glass, metal, and high-quality plastics.
description: A large, ultra-thin flat-screen television with a sleek black display, minimal bezels, and a central metallic stand. The design is modern and minimalist, with a smooth matte finish.
description_view_0: The television is seen from the side, showcasing its ultra-thin profile and the central support stand extending backward.
description_view_1: The back view reveals a flat, matte black surface with a single central support, no visible ports or branding.
description_view_2: Another side view, mirroring view 0, again emphasizing the thinness and the angular support stand.
description_view_3: The front view displays the wide, black screen with minimal bezels and the metallic central stand visible at the bottom.
attribute_bezel_design: ultra-thin, black, likely plastic or metal, minimalistic styling
